name: Peoples Bank
description_short: Clifton, TN's Peoples Bank branch at 129 Main St serves the local community with full-service banking in a downtown location.
description_long:
Peoples Bank's Clifton, TN branch is located at 129 Main St, positioned in the heart of downtown Clifton. This standalone banking facility serves the local community and surrounding areas. While specific hours aren't published online, customers are encouraged to visit in person or contact the branch directly for current operating times.

The Clifton location offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including personal checking and savings accounts, business banking solutions, and lending products. The bank's staff is equipped to assist with account management, financial planning, and other banking needs. Visit the branch in person to discuss your financial goals and explore the services available.

For Clifton residents seeking convenient local banking, this Peoples Bank branch provides essential financial services without traveling outside the community. Bring a valid photo ID and any relevant account information when visiting. Whether you need to open an account, deposit funds, or seek financial advice, the downtown Clifton location serves as a straightforward option for personal banking.
services: FDIC-insured savings accounts and Certificates of Deposit
Kasasa Checking Accounts with rewards features
Personal and Family Club Checking options
Business loans for expansion and equipment financing
Online banking platform with account management
Debit card services with fraud protection
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
Multiple checking account types tailored to different customer profiles (seniors, families, standard users)
Both personal and business lending solutions available
Online and mobile banking available 24/7 across devices
Accessible website with screen reader support (Alt+1 accessibility mode)
Multiple dedicated customer service phone lines for specific issues
Secure document sharing through ShareFile portal for loan applications
Branch and ATM locator tool for finding nearby physical locations
cons: Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules
Minimum account balance requirements not disclosed online
Limited detail on loan terms, rates, or approval criteria
No information about credit requirements for loan products
Sparse product comparison tools or calculators for account selection
best_for: Customers seeking traditional bank services with modern digital access
Small business owners needing local lending relationships and business accounts
Home buyers wanting relationship-based mortgage lending with in-person support
Senior customers with specialized account options (Senior Plus Checking)
diagnosis: Peoples Bank is best suited for customers who value traditional banking relationships with established branch networks but also want convenient digital banking access. The primary caveat is that the website provides minimal transparency on pricing, rates, and specific terms—prospective customers will need to contact the bank directly or visit a branch for detailed product information before making account or lending decisions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
